% =====================================================================
% Static, hand-authored tables for the ProteinIK paper.
% These do NOT depend on benchmark numbers; the data-driven results tables
% are generated by paper/figures/make_tables.py into this same directory.
%
% Preamble needs:  \usepackage{booktabs}  \usepackage{makecell}  \usepackage{array}
% =====================================================================

% ---------------------------------------------------------------------
% Table 1 -- the folding / inverse-kinematics isomorphism
% ---------------------------------------------------------------------
\begin{table}[t]
\centering
\caption{The folding / inverse-kinematics isomorphism.}
\label{tab:isomorphism}
\begin{tabular}{@{}ll@{}}
\toprule
\textbf{Protein folding} & \textbf{Inverse kinematics} \\
\midrule
Backbone dihedral angles $\phi/\psi$ (soft DOF) & Joint angles $q$ (the DOF) \\
Rigid bonds / fixed bond lengths       & Fixed link lengths (FK constraints) \\
Native (folded) state                  & The IK solution configuration \\
Free-energy funnel                     & Convergence basin to the target \\
Rugged landscape / kinetic traps       & Local minima / failed solves \\
Excluded volume (sterics)              & Self-collision avoidance \\
Hydrophobic collapse                   & Coarse approach to the target region \\
Secondary structure (local order)      & Local joint settling \\
Molecular chaperone (GroEL)            & Restart / rescue from a stuck state \\
Kinetic partitioning (fast vs.\ slow)  & Easy vs.\ hard targets \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{table}

% ---------------------------------------------------------------------
% Table 2 -- robots (trimmed; the DH-defect narrative lives in the prose)
% ---------------------------------------------------------------------
\begin{table}[t]
\centering
\caption{Robots.}
\label{tab:robots}
\begin{tabular}{@{}llp{0.60\linewidth}@{}}
\toprule
Arm & DOF & Notes \\
\midrule
Planar 3-DOF (RRR) & 3 & Link lengths $[0.4,0.3,0.2]$~m; exact closed-form IK --- the ground-truth validator. \\
UR5          & 6 & Non-redundant; standard-DH; the primary tuning and validation arm. \\
Franka Panda & 7 & Redundant; modified/Craig DH (Sec.~3.1); tight, asymmetric limits (joint~4 confined to $[-3.07,-0.07]$~rad). Verified against \texttt{panda\_link8} in franka\_ros to $\approx$1e-7~m. \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{table}

% ---------------------------------------------------------------------
% Table 3 -- scenario hardness thresholds
% ---------------------------------------------------------------------
\begin{table}[t]
\centering
\caption{Scenario hardness thresholds.}
\label{tab:thresholds}
\begin{tabular}{@{}llll@{}}
\toprule
Scenario & Criterion & Threshold & \texttt{max\_tries} \\
\midrule
\texttt{open\_space}    & none                     & ---                                             & 1 (no rejection) \\
\texttt{near\_singular} & $m(q)<\tau_{ms}$ (Eq.~30)& planar 0.001 / UR5 0.005 / Franka 0.015         & 50 \\
\texttt{cluttered}      & $d(q)<-0.03$ (Eq.~5)     & $-0.03$~m (all arms)                            & 200 \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{table}

% ---------------------------------------------------------------------
% Table 4 -- baseline hyperparameters (small font; wide table)
% ---------------------------------------------------------------------
\begin{table*}[t]
\centering
\caption{Baseline configurations --- genuine imported and native implementations.}
\label{tab:baselines}
\small
\begin{tabular}{@{}lp{0.30\linewidth}llp{0.28\linewidth}@{}}
\toprule
Solver & Update rule & Iteration budget & Damping / population & Stagnation response \\
\midrule
Jacobian-DLS & Robotics Toolbox \texttt{ik\_LM} (Corke), single-shot from $q_0$ & \texttt{ilimit}=200, \texttt{slimit}=1 & none & none --- single trajectory \\
CCD & native C++/Eigen port; one-joint base$\to$tip rotation; wrist blends $0.5\times$ orientation & \texttt{max\_iters}=300 sweeps & n/a & none \\
FABRIK & native C++/Eigen port; forward/backward reaching; wrist nudged $0.6\times$ & \texttt{max\_iters}=150 & n/a & none \\
TRAC-IK & genuine TRACLabs C++/KDL/NLopt (\texttt{tracikpy}), \texttt{solve\_type}=Speed & 5\,ms timeout, $\epsilon$=1e-5 & KDL-Newton + NLopt-SQP & library-native random reseed on stall \\
Multi-start & Robotics Toolbox \texttt{ik\_LM} (Corke) from random seeds & \texttt{ilimit}=30/search & up to \texttt{slimit}=100 restarts & best converged of the set \\
Analytical (planar) & closed-form trigonometric IK & exact & --- & --- \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{table*}
